title.zh: 前端性能优化：思路、防御与监控选型

description.zh: 系统梳理前端性能优化思路、分片方案、防御机制与监控系统选型实践。
description.en: A systematic overview of frontend performance optimization, task slicing, defense mechanisms, and monitoring options.

description.zh: jQuery 的核心用法与常见场景
description.en: jQuery core APIs and common use cases.

title.zh: iOS 证书类型简单入门

description.zh: 梳理常见 iOS 证书、描述文件及典型使用场景。
description.en: A short overview of common iOS certificate types, provisioning profiles, and usage scenarios.

title.zh: 在内网部署 Source Map 调试线上问题
title.en: Debugging Production with Intranet Source Maps

description.zh: 介绍 Source Map 的常见类型，以及如何在不暴露源码的前提下，在内网部署 Source Map 调试线上问题。
description.en: Explains common Source Map types and how to deploy them on an intranet to debug production issues without exposing source code.

title.zh: 编写 Webpack 插件自动上传 Source Map
title.en: Writing a Webpack Plugin to Upload Source Maps

description.zh: 记录如何通过一个简单的 Webpack 插件，在构建完成后自动遍历并上传 Source Map 到内网服务。
description.en: Shows how to build a simple Webpack plugin that uploads Source Maps to an intranet service after builds complete.

title.zh: Sentry 接入与部署踩坑记录

description.zh: 介绍 Sentry 能解决什么问题、前端接入方式，以及 SaaS 与自建部署时常见的实际问题和注意点。
description.en: Covers what Sentry is used for, basic frontend integration steps, and common issues when deploying SaaS vs self-hosted Sentry.

title.zh: 前端脚手架开发的一次实践
title.en: A Practical Note on Frontend Scaffold CLI

description.zh: 记录一次前端脚手架（CLI）开发的思路和实现，包括命令设计、交互问答、模板管理和生成流程。
description.en: Notes on building a frontend scaffold CLI: command design, interactive prompts, template management, and project generation workflow.

title.zh: 用 Puppeteer + Node 做证书截图服务
title.en: Certificate Screenshot Service with Puppeteer and Node

description.zh: 考试证书通过背景图加定位渲染，用 Node 启动 Puppeteer 做异步截图，渲染证书时直接产出图片的实践。
description.en: Using Node and Puppeteer to build an async screenshot service for exam certificates rendered with background image and positioning; output images directly for display.

title.zh: 用低代码搭了一套证书模板系统
title.en: Building a Low-Code Certificate Template System

description.zh: 班级、考试活动带来多种证书与自定义样式需求，用低代码搭建证书模板系统，与 Puppeteer 截图服务对接产出图片。
description.en: As classes and exam activities required various certificate types and custom styles, we built a low-code certificate template system that integrates with the Puppeteer screenshot service to output images.

title.zh: 如何从 0 到 1 搭建前端性能监控 SDK
title.en: Building a Frontend Performance Monitoring SDK from Scratch

description.zh: 梳理前端性能监控 SDK 的目标、数据来源（Performance API、PerformanceObserver）、设计与实现步骤，便于自建采集与上报。
description.en: A practical guide to building a frontend performance monitoring SDK: what to measure, data sources (Performance API, PerformanceObserver), design and implementation steps.

title.zh: 从技术分享到落地：业务组件库与通用函数库搭建
title.en: From Tech Share to Practice: Building a Business Component Library and Shared Utils

description.zh: 基于内部「如何提高代码稳定性」分享中的代码分层思路，落地业务组件库与通用函数库，并解决公用组件无测试、新组件目录不清等问题。
description.en: After an internal talk on code layering for stability, we built a business component library and shared utils library, and addressed missing tests and unclear directory conventions.

title.zh: 监控平台接入 rrweb：从周会到落地的记录
title.en: Integrating rrweb into the Monitoring Platform: From Weekly Meeting to Production

description.zh: 监控平台接入 rrweb 的踩坑记录：敏感信息与法务、数据裁剪与压缩、过期机制、JS 与 Go/C++ 的 ECC 加密互通。
description.en: Pitfalls and lessons from integrating rrweb into the monitoring platform: sensitive data compliance, trimming and compression, expiration, and ECC interoperability (JS, Go, C++).

title.zh: 基于业务组件库的低代码页面搭建：组件与 API 适配，零开发搭页面
title.en: Low-Code Page Builder on Top of Business Component Library: Component–API Mapping, No Dev Required

description.zh: 基于业务组件库与现有 API 做组件与接口一对多适配，支持数据源一键拉取/导入/手动添加、枚举配置、三列配置界面与模板功能，无需开发即可完成页面搭建。
description.en: Component–API one-to-many mapping using the business component library and existing APIs; data source fetch/import/manual add, enum config, three-column config UI, and templates for zero-dev page building.

title.zh: Web3 浏览器钱包：助记词、私钥存储与用户密码
title.en: Web3 Browser Wallets: Mnemonic, Key Storage, and User Password

description.zh: 介绍 Web3 浏览器钱包的助记词生成（BIP-39）、私钥存储机制（种子派生、Keystore、vault）以及用户密码的作用与边界。
description.en: An intro to mnemonic generation (BIP-39), private key storage (seed derivation, Keystore, vault), and the role of the user password in Web3 browser wallets.

title.zh: 从 0 到 1 搭建一个 DApp：技术选型、踩坑与实战
title.en: Building a DApp from 0 to 1: Tech Stack, Pitfalls, and Practice

description.zh: 从技术选型、常用技术栈、实际搭建流程、踩坑、成本、性能优化、稳定性、学习成本到 Web3 常用组件库，梳理一条可落地的 DApp 搭建路径。
description.en: A practical guide to building a DApp: tech stack selection, common combinations, step-by-step workflow, pitfalls, cost, performance, stability, learning curve, and common Web3 libraries.
